perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up shot of orange, translucent softgel capsules resting in a small white ceramic dish. (2) Transition to a male creator with dyed brown hair, wearing a white t-shirt and large white over-ear headphones, sitting in a studio filled with figurines. He holds a dark blue product box (LPC-DHA) and speaks with exaggerated facial expressions and hand gestures. (3) He switches to a white product box labeled 'NMN' and displays a dish of white capsules, followed by a close-up of a single white capsule held between his thumb and index finger. (4) He introduces a third white box (Collagen) and shows a dish filled with fine white powder. (5) The final phase shows him holding up multiple boxes and pointing towards the camera, emphasizing the promotional deals.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately. A male voice speaks very loudly and enthusiastically in a mix of Mandarin and Hokkien, with a high-pitched and persuasive tone. (2) The music remains continuous at a moderate volume while the creator's voice fluctuates in pitch and intensity as he shouts specific prices and discount percentages. (3) Sounds of clapping are heard intermittently, coinciding with the creator's physical clapping to emphasize excitement. (4) The audio concludes with a final enthusiastic summary and a call to action over the same consistent upbeat BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '智慧達 LPC-DHA 新型態營養補給軟膠囊' appears as a title at the start. (2) Decorative Hook: '5折!' and '買一送一' appear in large, bold, colorful fonts with an excited tone to highlight the discount. (3) Functional Text: Pricing information like '兩盒$3000', '兩盒 1980!', and '兩盒 1680!' is displayed clearly. (4) Functional Text: Ingredient details such as '含有藻油 (DHA) 南極磷蝦萃取' and '日本酵母來源 NMN' are listed during product segments. (5) Decorative Hook: '嘎哥獨家優惠' and '限量 100 組' appear to create a sense of urgency and exclusivity.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product 1 Presentation -> Product 2 Presentation -> Product 3 Presentation -> Final Offer Summary

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator (Cai Aga) appearing as the central host.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Male creator with short dyed brown hair, wearing white over-ear headphones and a white graphic t-shirt with a green mask print.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A home studio setup featuring a microphone on a boom arm and shelves filled with numerous colorful collectible figurines (Funko Pops, etc.).

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature/Price -> Feature/Price -> Feature/Price -> Summary/CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional marketing piece (likely a live stream highlight) designed to sell three specific health supplement products under the RAUTH ONE brand. The creator uses high-energy delivery, clear price-point callouts ('Buy 1 Get 1 Free'), and limited-quantity hooks to drive immediate purchase behavior.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is directly presenting the products, discussing their specific health benefits, quoting promotional prices, and urging viewers to buy.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Cai Aga's signature high-volume, multi-lingual (Mandarin/Hokkien) comedic sales style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video employs typical 'live commerce' visual grammar, including large price graphics, close-ups of product texture/form, and a high-pacing edit to maintain viewer engagement.
